title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
original_title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction Case of the Century
overview: A look at an nineteen eighties abduction event that happened to  Linda  Napolitano (previously Cortile) in Manhattan.
